mapper.sql: key, disabled, href, avatar, name, owner, "desc", call_no, status, updated_at, created_at, progress
mapper.insert:
insert into demo_rule
key,
disabled,
href,
avatar,
name,
owner,
"desc",
call_no,
status,
updated_at,
created_at,
progress,
#{key,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
#{href,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{owner,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{desc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{callNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{progress,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update demo_rule
disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
href = #{href,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
owner = #{owner,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
desc = #{desc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
call_no = #{callNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
progress = #{progress,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where key = #{key,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update demo_rule set disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, href = #{href,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, owner = #{owner,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, desc = #{desc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, call_no = #{callNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, progress = #{progress,jdbcType=INTEGER} where key = #{key,jdbcType=INTEGER}
